decisions.observation:
Your current goal: Wait on Platform 3 and board your train when it arrives.
⚠️ You have been stationary for 1 minute(s) while the evacuation alarm is active. Staying put any longer is dangerous — you must decide to move now.

What is NEW since your last decision:
No significant new information.
⚠️ Ongoing situation: The fire alarm is sounding throughout the station. You cannot see any evidence of a fire.
You are in Platform 2 (Escalators E and F go up to the concourse).
You are waiting.
Exits visible right now: Escalator D (down to platforms) (very close); Escalator E (going up), Escalator F (going up) (nearby); Escalator C (going up), Escalator B (going up) (visible in distance).
The area is crowded (many people nearby).
Most people nearby are heading toward the escalators.
decisions.prompt:
Decision task: choose your next action now. Respond with ONLY this JSON:
{
  "reasoning": "1-2 sentences grounded in goal + current observations",
  "action_type": "wait" or "move",
  "target_type": ONE OF: "current_position", "exit", "agent",
  "target_agent": null (or agent_id like "agent_5"),
  "exit_name": null (or the exit name EXACTLY as listed in visible/valid exits),
  "zone_name": null,
  "wait_reason": null (or reason if waiting),
  "speed": null (or "slow_walk", "normal_walk", "brisk_walk", "jog", "run"),
  "message": null (or your spoken words),
  "message_type": null (or "directed", "shout"),
  "goal_update": null (or revised plain-text goal if your fundamental objective has changed),
}

Hard constraints:
- If action_type='wait', target_type MUST be 'current_position'.
- If target_type='exit', exit_name is required and must match an allowed exit name exactly.
- If target_type='agent', target_agent is required.
- Keep spoken message short and natural; no narration.
- goal_update: null unless your fundamental objective has genuinely changed.

Decision policy:
1. If helping someone, stay coordinated with that person.
2. To progress toward your goal, choose target_type='exit' or target_type='agent'.
3. If uncertain or waiting, choose target_type='current_position'.


Visible exits right now:
  • Escalator D (down to platforms)
  • Escalator B (going up)
  • Escalator C (going up)
  • Escalator F (going up)
  • Escalator E (going up)
